question: Dusan Vlahovic: Anytime Goalscorer
description: In the upcoming Serie A game between Juventus FC and US Sassuolo Calcio, scheduled for March 21, 2026 at 3:45 PM ET: This market will resolve to "Yes" if Dusan Vlahovic is credited with a goal in the official box score within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. events.title: Juventus FC vs. US Sassuolo Calcio - Player Props
events.description: Goal scorers for the Serie A game between Juventus FC and US Sassuolo Calcio, scheduled for March 21, 2026 at 3:45 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Juventus' Dusan Vlahovic tops player prop markets with over 60% implied probability for anytime goalscorer, fueled by his league-leading 8 goals in 10 Serie A starts and Sassuolo's porous defense conceding 2.1 goals per game away. Schedule rest favors the hosts post-midweek Coppa tilt.
